name: Structure-flex
message: A family-owned business, Structure-flex has specialised in the use of PVC and high-frequency fabric welding technology to manufacture innovative solutions for over 46 years.In 1970, the company brought to market the innovative “Big Bag” for the oil and gas industry - a resilient PVC bulk bag built to contain large volumes of dry or liquid produce.Since then, the company has evolved to undertake challenges in a range of industries to become a leading manufacturer of high quality tension lorry curtains, since the product was first invented.The company has continued to provide an increasing range of innovative technical products for the commercial vehicle industry as well as wide-format digital printing, proof load test bags for weight-bearing equipment such as cranes, and air lift bags for the diving industry.With innovation and high quality at the heart of every product, entire projects are undertaken in-house from concept/development to the final product to provide end-to-end tailor-made solutions.Geo: UK - Leak size: 139 GB Archive - Contains: Files
